zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Chappes於1175年出生在法國時，她的父親Guy II De Ray16歲，母親N De Chappes15歲。她於1195年與Geoffroy De Villehardouin I在法國布格萊其斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1236年享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Chappes于1175年出生在法国时，她的父亲Guy II De Ray16岁，母亲N De Chappes15岁。她于1195年与Geoffroy De Villehardouin I在法国布格萊其斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1236年享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chappes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Chappell
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a chapel, from Middle English chapel(l)e ‘chapel’, via Old French, from Late Latin capella, originally a diminutive of capa ‘hood, cloak’, but later transferred to the sense ‘chapel, sanctuary’, with reference to the shrine at Tours where the cloak of Saint Martin was preserved as a relic.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Chappes was born in 1175, in France, her father, Guy II De Ray, was 16 and her mother, N De Chappes, was 15. She married Geoffroy De Villehardouin I in 1195, in Lézinnes, Yonne, Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1236, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Chappes est née en 1175, à France, son père, Guy II De Ray, avait 16 ans et sa mère, N De Chappes, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroy De Villehardouin I en 1195, à Lézinnes, Yonne, Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1236, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Chappes 1175 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy II De Ray 16 und ihre Mutter N De Chappes 15. Sie hat 1195 in Lézinnes, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich Geoffroy De Villehardouin I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1236 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Chappes è nata il nel 1175 nel Francia, sua padre, Guy II De Ray, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, N De Chappes, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Geoffroy De Villehardouin I nel 1195, nel Lézinnes, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1236, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Chappesが1175年にフランスで生まれた時，父Guy II De Rayは16歳，母N De Chappesは15歳であった。1195年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンルeズインスでGeoffroy De Villehardouin Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1236年に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Chappes(이)가 1175년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy II De Ray(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 N De Chappes(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1195년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 e진스에서 Geoffroy De Villehardouin I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Chappes nasceu em 1175, em França, seu pai, Guy II De Ray, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, N De Chappes, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroy De Villehardouin I em 1195, em Lézinnes, Yonne, Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1236, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Chappes родилась в 1175 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Guy II De Ray было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали N De Chappes, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroy De Villehardouin I в 1195 г. в местности лeзиннесь, енн, бургогн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1236 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Chappes nació en 1175, en Francia, su papá, Guy II De Ray, tenía 16 años y su mamá, N De Chappes, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Geoffroy De Villehardouin I en 1195, en Lézinnes, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1236, a la edad de 61 años.
